events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: forms are built and braced but not oiled — per ACI 347 this is a correctable but must-fix defect, since pouring against untreated forms risks concrete bonding, surface tear-out/honeycombing, and damage during stripping. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: medium`, with corrective actions to apply form release agent and re-inspect before placing concrete.
